summary: Comprehensive testing completed for BareForce One corporate website. Both frontend and backend functionality verified with excellent results. Website fully functional with professional design, all navigation working, contact form integrating properly with backend, and mobile responsiveness confirmed.

validation_bugs.issue: Accepts invalid form data (empty name, invalid email) instead of validating and returning 400/422 error
validation_bugs.impact: Minor - form still works, but should validate input properly

passed_tests: Backend /api/health endpoint returns healthy status
Contact form submission successfully POSTs to /api/contact and saves data
CORS headers properly configured
Home page loads with hero section, cinematic background, and CTAs
Navigation bar displays all 7 links correctly
Trust bar shows 5 trust items
Audience section displays 3 cards linking to respective pages
Capabilities section shows 6 capability cards
Case studies section displays 3 real case study cards
All navigation links route correctly to pages
Government page loads properly
Enterprise page loads properly
Local business page loads properly
Capabilities page loads with core capabilities
Case studies page loads with University of Colorado, University of Wisconsin, and E-Commerce cases
About page loads with company information
Contact page loads with functional form (name, email, org, sector, message)
Contact form integration works perfectly - form submission shows success message
Footer displays company info, UEI (FJRRJ6JNJ375), contact details
Mobile responsive navigation toggle works correctly
Mobile menu opens/closes properly
Mobile navigation links function correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Add input validation to /api/contact endpoint to properly reject invalid form data (empty required fields, malformed emails) with 400/422 status codes instead of accepting them.
